notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, alien marching, shields, mystery ship, waves, lives, scoring) but collision detection has a bug (pBullet rect check uses w+x instead of x), alien sprites are rough pixel-art approximations, mystery ship timer logic is broken (mysteryTimer never properly counts down in play), and the death/respawn flow has some jank with the deathT initialization.

The game has recognizable Space Invaders visuals and basic shooting, but major state/render bugs (notably paused state freezing updates and the player often not rendering during normal play) significantly hurt controls and playability.
